details.IncidentDetail: "[28] [Appended, 22:14:22] [4] [Geographic Area: I5 S / HOOD FRANKLIN RD] [Medium] [Information] PLEASE NOTIFY FARM OWNER - PETE SAUNDERS (916) 870-7150 OF ANY VEHICLE DAMAGE TO FREEWAY FENCE - FROM HOOD FRANKLIN RD TO LAMBERT RD - TO PREVENT CATTLE FROM ESCAPING."
